property.name: gateway.port
property.description: The HTTP port for the Gateway.

property.name: gateway.path
property.description: The default context path for the gateway.

property.name: gateway.gateway.conf.dir
property.description: The directory within GATEWAY_HOME that contains gateway topology files and deployments.

property.name: gateway.ldap.enabled
property.description: Enable the embedded LDAP service for user and group lookups. Set to true to enable.

property.name: gateway.ldap.port
property.description: Port for the LDAP service to listen on. Default is 3890.

property.name: gateway.ldap.base.dn
property.description: Base DN for LDAP entries in the proxy server. Default is dc=proxy,dc=com.

property.name: gateway.ldap.recursive.group.resolution
property.desciption: Boolean value indicating whether recursive group resolution is enabled in KnoxLDAPService.

property.name: gateway.ldap.interceptor.names
property.description: Interceptor names for LDAP service in priority order.

property.name: gateway.ldap.backend.data.file
property.description: Path to JSON data file for file-based backend. Supports ${GATEWAY_DATA_HOME} variable.

property.name: gateway.ldap.interceptor.ldapproxy.backendType
property.description: Backend type for LDAP service. Currently supported: file, ldap. Future: jdbc, knox.

property.name: gateway.ldap.interceptor.ldapproxy.url
property.description: LDAP server URL for proxy backend

property.name: gateway.ldap.interceptor.ldapproxy.remoteBaseDn
property.description: Base DN of the remote LDAP server

property.name: gateway.ldap.interceptor.ldapproxy.systemUsername
property.description: LDAP bind DN for proxy backend authentication

property.name: gateway.ldap.interceptor.ldapproxy.systemPassword
property.description: LDAP bind password for proxy backend authentication
